article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, factual language and attributes characterizations to the White House. It does not adopt loaded or emotive framing. One minor interpretive line about standard safety protocols appears but is not politically charged.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like returned, identified, decided; no loaded phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: States that the decision demonstrated standard safety protocols without explicit sourcing.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: The safety-protocols sentence is mildly interpretive and not attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarming language; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: No competing perspectives present to favor; sticks to provided facts.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures all key details and the cited White House account.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives are factual (minor) and attributed to WH.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Relies on WH as the sole source because that’s what the article provides; attribution is clear.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than necessary; avoids adopting any charged framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes the White House perspective; listing AP as a perspective is extraneous but not omissive.
